summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Meridiant crypto platform v2.0. All 3 major features verified: CoinGecko live prices, Google OAuth UI, On-chain checkout for BSC. Backend 17/17 tests passed, Frontend all flows working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. On-chain checkout only shows for withdraw (crypto→fiat) flows, not transfer (fiat→crypto). Wallet balances in withdraw tab are MOCKED in mockData.js.

backend_api_tests.prices_endpoint: PASSED - CoinGecko source, 60+ rate pairs including IDRT.BSC, USDT.BSC
backend_api_tests.google_session_endpoint: PASSED - Exists, returns 401 for invalid session_id
backend_api_tests.transactions_with_chain_hash: PASSED - Accepts tx_hash and chain fields
backend_api_tests.transactions_without_hash: PASSED - Status pending when no tx_hash
backend_api_tests.auth_me: PASSED - Returns user data with valid token

frontend_ui_tests.signin_modal: PASSED - Opens, has Google button, credentials work
frontend_ui_tests.google_signin_button: PASSED - 'Continue with Google' button present in Sign-In modal
frontend_ui_tests.google_signup_button: PASSED - 'Continue with Google' button present in Sign-Up modal
frontend_ui_tests.live_prices: PASSED - Transfer form uses live rates from /api/prices (IDR→IDRT.BSC = 1:1)
frontend_ui_tests.wallet_connect: PASSED - MetaMask can be connected (mock mode when not installed)
frontend_ui_tests.transfer_tab_flow: PASSED - IDR→IDRT.BSC transfer flow opens checkout modal
frontend_ui_tests.withdraw_tab_flow: PASSED - IDRT.BSC→IDR withdraw flow opens checkout with on-chain support
frontend_ui_tests.percentage_buttons: PASSED - 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% buttons work correctly in withdraw tab
frontend_ui_tests.onchain_indicator: PASSED - 'On-Chain Transfer' indicator shown for BSC tokens in checkout
frontend_ui_tests.onchain_button: PASSED - 'Sign & Send On-Chain' button shown for BSC withdraw

mocked_apis.wallet_balances: MOCKED - Balances in mockData.js (e.g., 5,000,000 IDRT, 2,500,000 IDRT.BSC)

feature_verification.coingecko_prices: ✓ Live rates from CoinGecko with fallback, 60+ rate pairs
feature_verification.google_oauth_ui: ✓ 'Continue with Google' button in both Sign-In and Sign-Up modals, redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
feature_verification.onchain_bsc_support: ✓ Checkout shows 'On-Chain Transfer' indicator and 'Sign & Send On-Chain' button for BSC tokens
